channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Wealthy nations pledge record release of emergency oil reserves in a bid to calm surging prices - AP News

item.title: ExxonMobil moves to reincorporate in Texas from New Jersey - The Texas Tribune
item.description:
1. ExxonMobil moves to reincorporate in Texas from New Jersey  The Texas Tribune
  2. Exxon seeks to move legal home from New Jersey to Texas  Fox Business
  3. Exxon looks to ditch New Jersey incorporation for Texas homecoming  Reuters
  4. ExxonMobil Board unanimously recommends redomiciling the company from New Jersey to Texas  Exxon Mobil Corporation
  5. ExxonMobil joins corporate migration to Texas amid investor activism battle  Financial Times

item.title: Yann LeCun just raised $1bn to prove the AI industry has got it wrong - The Next Web
item.description:
1. Yann LeCun just raised $1bn to prove the AI industry has got it wrong  The Next Web
  2. Yann LeCun Raises $1 Billion to Build AI That Understands the Physical World  WIRED
  3. Former Meta A.I. Chief’s Start-Up Is Valued at $3.5 Billion  The New York Times
  4. Yann LeCun’s New AI Startup Raises $1 Billion in Seed Funding  Bloomberg.com
  5. Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03B to build world models  TechCrunch

item.title: Ford launches new AI to grow multibillion-dollar Pro commercial business - CNBC
item.description:
1. Ford launches new AI to grow multibillion-dollar Pro commercial business  CNBC
  2. Ford is giving its commercial fleet business an AI makeover  The Verge
  3. Ford Pro Virtual Assistant Simplifies Commercial Fleet Management  PYMNTS.com
  4. Ford Rolls Out a New Chatbot, Ford Stock (NYSE:F) Jumps  TipRanks
  5. Short on Time? Need Answers Fast? Meet Ford Pro AI  Ford From the Road
